ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_components" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used in the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the project */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date the component was allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that consumes the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., logic slices, LUTs, BRAM, DSP48E1) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the resource consumed */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource value */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the resource that the component can consume */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the resource that the component can consume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_resources_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_resources_resource_name FOREIGN KEY ("resource_name") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., logic slices, LUTs, BRAM, DSP48E1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Default unit of measurement for the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification value */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the specification value (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user working on the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project (e.g., project manager, lead engineer, team member) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, engineer, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
